title: chrysanthemum praecox
intro: Chrysanthemum praecox, also known as the early chrysanthemum or Korean chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum praecox include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of fever, headaches, and respiratory issues. Chrysanthemum praecox is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and is also used in herbal infusions and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
